name: Improper Neutralization of Record Delimiters
description: The product does not properly neutralize characters that function as record delimiters (e.g., newlines in CSV, record separators in fixed-format data) in user input, allowing attackers to inject, remove, or manipulate record boundaries.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing record delimiter characters (newlines, record separators) that flows into TRANSFORM[record_output] or STORAGE[record_data] without a TRANSFORM[record_delimiter_escape] that escapes or strips record-boundary characters
